entry.title: SpiritVale Official Date release!
entry.summary: The moment you has been waiting for is here!Official SpiritVale dates for the upcoming days and months, please read carefully:June 8: End Playtest and Wipe.In this day we will end Playtest and game progress will be wiped. Everything you have will wiped, if you bought premium currency you will get them back once Early Access release.From June 8 to June 12th: PerformanceWe will work on polish, fixes
